headline: The Dow's Early Gains Slipped Away. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are Still at Records.
summary: The Dow's early gains slipped away on Friday. The blue-chip index was down slightly after rallying more than 300 points earlier in the session. The S&P 500 was up 0.6% and the Nasdaq was up 1%. Both hit record intraday highs and would mark closing highs if manage a gain.

headline: FDA Tavneos Proposal Puts Amgen’s Data Integrity And Oversight In Focus
summary: The US FDA has proposed withdrawing Amgen's Tavneos after finding alleged clinical trial data manipulation. Regulators also report that untrue statements were made in the approval process for the drug. This development brings attention to data integrity, compliance, and potential business and reputational effects for NasdaqGS:AMGN. Amgen, traded as NasdaqGS:AMGN, is a large biopharmaceutical company with a portfolio of therapies across several disease areas. An FDA proposal to withdraw...
